qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Integer overflow in message size calculation allows denial of service
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: VULN-007 is a different vulnerability than the advisory. The advisory describes Gossipsub PRUNE.backoff Duration Overflow where attacker-controlled backoff values cause Duration/Instant overflow. VULN-007 describes integer overflow in quick-protobuf-codec message size calculation. Different components (Gossipsub PRUNE handling vs quick-protobuf-codec), different overflow mechanisms (Duration/Instant time arithmetic vs integer addition), and different attack vectors (PRUNE control message vs generic protobuf message).

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Missing Public Key Validation in Plaintext Transport Permits Authentication Bypass and Peer Impersonation
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: VULN-002 is a different vulnerability than the advisory. The advisory describes Gossipsub PRUNE.backoff Duration Overflow causing DoS via panic. VULN-002 describes authentication bypass in plaintext transport handshake enabling peer impersonation. Different components (Gossipsub vs plaintext transport), different vulnerability classes (duration overflow DoS vs authentication bypass), and different impacts (denial of service vs MITM/impersonation).

target_advisory_judgement.reason: Neither qualifying vulnerability matches the advisory-described vulnerability. The advisory (GHSA-gc42-3jg7-rxr2) describes a Duration/Instant overflow vulnerability in Gossipsub PRUNE.backoff handling where attacker-controlled backoff values (e.g., u64::MAX) cause panic during time arithmetic. VULN-007 describes integer overflow in quick-protobuf-codec message size calculation (different component, different overflow type). VULN-002 describes authentication bypass in plaintext transport handshake (different component, different vulnerability class). Neither finding identifies the Gossipsub PRUNE.backoff handling code or the Duration/Instant overflow root cause described in the advisory.
evidence: Advisory CVE-2026-33040: Gossipsub PRUNE.backoff Duration Overflow in libp2p-gossipsub
Advisory attack vector: crafted PRUNE control message with large backoff value (u64::MAX)
Advisory root cause: unchecked Duration/Instant arithmetic in backoff update logic
Advisory impact: panic in networking state machine, DoS
VULN-007: integer overflow in misc/quick-protobuf-codec/src/lib.rs:95 (message_length + varint_length)
VULN-007 component: quick-protobuf-codec, not Gossipsub PRUNE handling
VULN-007 overflow type: integer addition, not Duration/Instant time arithmetic
VULN-002 component: plaintext transport, not Gossipsub
VULN-002 vulnerability class: authentication bypass, not duration overflow DoS
